name: tflink-tmpfile
title: Tflink Tmpfile
description: Upload clipboard text or files to tmpfile.link anonymously and get a shareable link.
author: tflink-tmpfile

commands.name: upload
commands.title: Upload Clipboard to Tmpfile.link
commands.subtitle: tmpfile.link
commands.description: Uploads the current clipboard content to tmpfile.link and copies the URL.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
